title: [codereview] Implement mesh_to_mesh in Gateway using is_local_mesh, RPL SRH insertion, SCHC recompress and TX queue
description: Current forward_mesh_to_upstream unconditionally tunnels all decompressed mesh packets to TUN. Per spec/05-routing.md:7.2, must classify dst using RPL routing_table.lookup. If local_mesh, insert SourceRoutingHeader (from lichen_rpl::routing::SourceRoutingHeader), re-compress with RPL-aware SCHC rule, queue to sim/SLIP TX instead of TUN. Gateway.rpl.router.lookup_route or routes map. Update lichend.rs forward fn to branch on is_local_mesh. Add tests. This is the core of project-LICHEN-3k6w.1. codereview-tagged. P0 until implemented.
close_reason: Decomposed into subtasks (project-LICHEN-lug0.1-.4 for is_local_mesh classification, SRH insertion, SCHC recompress, TX queue+tests+lichend refactor)
